posts.text: MORE NUANCE: The liberal governments plan to find billions of dollars in savings would require a 24% cut to public service spending according to CCPA, carney has so far asked CBC via rail etc to find their own cuts of up to 15%. This video is the worst case scenario but PRETTY BAD!
